topStories.description: The Air Canada Express aircraft, operating a service from Montreal, reportedly struck a fire truck during landing, according to early accounts and flight-tracking data from Flightradar24.

topStories.description: Globally, the gold prices slipped more than 2% on Monday, extending their drop to a roughly four-month low.

topStories.title: Who is Nandita Gorlosa, BJP leader who joined Congress day before Assam nomination deadline?
topStories.description: Nandita Gorlosa's defection has triggered a reshuffle in the Congress’s candidate list for Assam elections as the party decided to field her from Haflong.

topStories.title: Trump holds DHS funding hostage over voter ID Bill as TSA workers go unpaid
topStories.description: President Donald Trump on Sunday said his fellow Republicans should not reach an agreement on funding the Department of Homeland Security until Democrats in Congress approve a bill that requires people registering to vote to provide proof of US citizenship.

topStories.description: The International Energy Agency chief said the war could lead to the world's worst energy crisis in decades.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by former US President Barack Obama: 'Make sure we're talking with each other in a way…'
topStories.description: Barack Obama emphasizes the importance of communication that heals rather than wounds, urging individuals to reflect on their speech's impact.

topStories.title: BJP minister Nandita Garlosa joins Congress day before Assam nomination deadline; to contest from Halflong
topStories.description: Haflong's sitting MLA Nandita Garlosa was denied a ticket by the BJP, which fielded Rupali Langthasa from the seat after dropping several sitting legislators.

topStories.title: World War 3, Rothschild banking in Iran: Former Trump ally reveals Netanyahu’s alleged plan, finds Epstein connection

topStories.title: Asian stock markets plunge amid Trump’s ultimatum on Iran
topStories.description: Key indexes in Japan, South Korea and Hong Kong tumble as Iran threatens attacks on energy infrastructure across region.

topStories.title: No let up in war & rhetoric, a break of 22,900 can take Nifty to 22,500
topStories.description: Geopolitical tensions and US President Donald Trump's stance on the Strait of Hormuz are creating market nervousness. Analysts predict Nifty will remain volatile this week. Key support is seen around 22,900, with a risk of decline to 22,500 if tensions escalate. Upside is expected to be capped between 23,400 and 24,200. Experts offer trading strategies and stock recommendations.

dailyNews.title: Iran's attack on Diego Garcia confirmed by UK. Was it linked to US use of base? Here's what British authorities said

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE Updates: Oil prices rise after Iran threatens to close Strait of Hormuz ‘indefinitely’
dailyNews.description: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE Updates: Oil held near $112 (Brent) and $98 (WTI) as Trump's 48-hour Hormuz ultimatum and Tehran's counter-threats kept markets on edge — with Brent still up over 50% since the conflict began in late February.

dailyNews.title: National blackout hits Cuba for second time in a week
dailyNews.description: Another total failure of its power grid underlines Cuba's hardship under a US-imposed fuel blockade.

dailyNews.title: Trump mocks Schumer over ‘fund ICE’ gaffe in senate remarks | Watch
dailyNews.description: As the funding impasse continues, Trump is using moments like Schumer’s gaffe to sharpen their messaging. Republicans emphasize national security risks tied to the broader DHS shutdown, while Democrats focus on immediate disruptions affecting travelers and calls for immigration enforcement reforms.

dailyNews.title: 9 suspects arrested after $7M in stolen cargo seized in Southern California bust
dailyNews.description: Nine suspects were arrested after authorities recovered $7 million in stolen cargo and $1 million in cash as part of a cargo theft bust in California.

dailyNews.title: Israel Thought It Could Spur Rebellion Inside Iran. That Hasn’t Happened.
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s hopes that an Israeli plan to ignite an internal uprising against Iran’s theocratic government could bring the war to a swift end have so far been dashed.

dailyNews.title: ICE to Help TSA at Airports Amid Partial Shutdown, Trump’s Border Czar Says
dailyNews.description: Tom Homan, President Trump’s chief border official, cast the operation largely as one to help ease long security lines. The Homeland Security Department said 14 airports across the country would be involved.

dailyNews.title: How Obama’s Strategist Discouraged Biden From Running in 2016
dailyNews.description: In a new set of oral histories, David Plouffe, President Barack Obama’s political adviser, described how he urged Vice President Joseph R. Biden Jr. not to challenge Hillary Clinton for the nomination.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Is the ‘Least Racist’ President. But His Term Echoes a Grim Past.
dailyNews.description: Woodrow Wilson’s presidency has taken on new resonance among historians and critics of President Trump, particularly when it comes to race.

dailyNews.title: In Denmark’s Election, How Will the Woman Who Took On Trump Fare?
dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen is the biggest force this country has seen in decades. The crisis in Greenland has energized her, but are voters itching for change?

dailyNews.title: Poll: Most say Iran war not going well, but don't want regime left in power
dailyNews.description: Most Republicans, especially MAGA, continue to support the US action and express a lot of confidence in Trump personally.

dailyNews.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz will be "completely closed" if Trump delivers on threats
dailyNews.description: President Trump's threat came after CENTCOM's commander said that Iran's ability to threaten the Strait of Hormuz had been "degraded."

dailyNews.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist TSA at airports as delays worsen
dailyNews.description: Wait times aren't expected to improve until government funding is restored and TSA officers receive paychecks.

dailyNews.title: Officials scramble to carry out Trump's directive on ICE agents at airports
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents will assist TSA agents at airports as delays and security staffing shortages continue to worsen.

dailyNews.title: Trump calling in ICE agents for airport security as DHS shutdown continues
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration says ICE officers will be stationed at hotspot U.S. airports starting Monday to assist with TSA screenings. They will undergo some training before then. Skyler Henry reports.

dailyNews.title: The American rare earths company seeking to topple China's dominance | 60 Minutes
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is working with a U.S. company to challenge China's dominance over rare earth elements. The metals are essential for components in smartphones, robotics, fighter jets, and drones.

dailyNews.title: Collapse of U.S. shipbuilding poses national and economic security risks | 60 Minutes
dailyNews.description: China rolls out over 1,000 cargo ships a year, while the U.S. – maybe three. The Trump administration has called this a crisis with both economic and national security risks.
